news.t: Bond-ETF inflows surge as demand returns for Treasurys

overview.description: The Vanguard Government Securities Active ETF (VGVT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in a diversified portfolio of investment grade US government bonds with varying maturities. It seeks to provide a moderate and sustainable level of current income. VGVT was launched on Jul 7, 2025 and is issued by Vanguard.

data.title: Bond-ETF inflows surge as demand returns for Treasurys
data.text: Demand for fixed-income exchange-traded funds has surged in the past week, as U.S. government debt reversed outflows.
